chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1417 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 21.08.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of MA 5565/25 For hearing of main case Mr. Arsalan Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. along with Insp. Aamir Hussain for SSP Jamshoro & SIP Muhammad Sulleman Lashari PS Jamshoro. Petitioners are called absent. The I.O of the case is also called absent. The Petitioners are directed to approach the I.O for recording her statement and in turn the I.O is directed to record the statement of Petitioner No.1 and on the basis of statement so made by petitioner No.1, he shall file the report within seven days before the concerned Magistrate under Section 173 Cr.P.C. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. As far as the grievance of the private respondent, if any, is concerned, he is at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of his grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
